all.critique:
Overall, the analysis does a good job of outlining the main stages of the FiT reproduction experiment, but there are a few points worth noting:

1. Ambiguity in Configuration Selection for Training Steps – Medium Severity.
 • The analysis mentions using “training_steps_fit_b2” for FiT‐B/2 and “training_steps_fit_xl2” for FiT‐XL/2, but it does not specify exactly how the code decides which parameter to use. This decision-making process (likely in the orchestration or configuration‐loading stage)
